docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT HUSSEINI, MOHAMMAD BURHAN JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 4.0 DAYS
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-01-2010 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
